title: Golden Globes 2026 Predictions: Supporting Actor Categories
text: InsideHook provides predictions and analysis for the 2026 Golden Globes Best Supporting Actor category. The article explains that Jacob Elordi will likely prevail because votes will split between two One Battle After Another nominees Benicio del Toro and Sean Penn, clearing the way for Elordi who was the heart and soul of Frankenstein to win. The predicted winner is Jacob Elordi from Frankenstein. However, the article notes that Benicio del Toro from One Battle After Another should win based on his subtle, calming presence in an otherwise chaotic story. The critic describes del Toro's portrayal as deserving of the award. Notable snub in the category is William H. Macy from Train Dreams who failed to receive a nomination despite critical acclaim. The analysis suggests that vote splitting could play a significant role in determining the winner of this competitive category.
